content.text:
[Workflow Task from Orchestrator]
Workflow ID: db1fbe26-d8f
Subtask ID: bd859c6b
Priority: 1

Task: Perform a technical audit of the OpenClaw Army system. Analyze: 1) The current function/tool definitions and their efficiency, 2) The delegation mechanism from Meta-Orchestrator to Managers, 3) Error handling and edge cases in the delegation flow, 4) Priority system implementation, 5) Context management and memory limitations, 6) Tool parameter optimization, 7) Potential bugs or failure modes. Look at the actual system code/implementation and identify specific technical improvements, refactoring opportunities, or architectural enhancements that would make the system more robust, faster, or more reliable. Provide concrete code-level recommendations.
